Spacious Accommodation: Vantage Point in Olten offers a spacious apartment with three bedrooms and a living room. The property includes a terrace and free WiFi, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and balcony with garden views. Additional amenities include a dining area, work desk, and free toiletries.

Local Attractions: The Roman Town of Augusta Raurica is 43 km away, and an ice-skating rink and scuba diving are nearby. Highly rated by guests, Vantage Point provides a pleasant stay in Olten.
